actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO site_surveys (
  site_id,
  vehicle_access_height,
  vehicle_access_height_notes,
  parking_loading_bay,
  parking_notes,
  lift_restrictions,
  lift_notes,
  narrow_corridors,
  corridor_notes,
  stairs_involved,
  stairs_notes,
  manual_handling_required,
  manual_handling_notes,
  escort_required,
  site_induction_required,
  ppe_requirements,
  site_hazards,
  security_procedures,
  security_details,
  driver_instructions,
  surveyed_by,
  survey_date
) VALUES (
  {{Number(appsmith.store.new_site_id)}},
  {{appsmith.store.ss_vehicle_access_height}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_vehicle_access_height_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_parking_loading_bay}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_parking_loading_bay_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_lift_restrictions}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_lift_restrictions_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_narrow_corridors}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_narrow_corridors_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_stairs_involved}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_stairs_involved_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_manual_handling_required}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_manual_handling_required_notes}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_escort_required}},
  {{appsmith.store.ss_site_induction_required}},
  ARRAY[{{appsmith.store.ss_ppe_requirements.map(function(p) { return "'" + p + "'"; }).join(',')}}]::varchar[],
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_site_hazards}}',
  {{appsmith.store.ss_security_procedures}},
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_security_procedures_details}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.ss_driver_instructions}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.userName}}',
  CURRENT_DATE
)
RETURNING survey_id;
